Deploy SGSC-AI protocol to analyze the supply chain risk and uncover the true industry role of Suzhi Technology.

**SGSC-AI Intelligence Probe Executed**

Jiangsu Suzhi Technology Co., Ltd. is a highly capitalized, asset-light IT system integrator and wholesale distributor masquerading as a device manufacturer. Despite an impressive, fully paid-in capital of 50.22 million RMB, its physical reality contradicts its classification: it is registered in 'Room 2110', a single office suite in a commercial building on Zhujiang Road (Nanjing's historical IT retail street), and employs only 12 insured staff. It is physically impossible to manufacture the vast array of hardware listed in its scope (telecom products, chemical equipment, medical devices, optoelectronics) within a 21st-floor office with a dozen employees. The entity utilizes its massive capital base strictly as a financial lever to secure large-scale government or institutional bidding contracts for intelligent system integration, security systems, and bulk equipment procurement, subsequently outsourcing the actual hardware acquisition and installation.

**Risk Profile Summary:**
Trust Tier: **L1_REGISTERED** (Score: 73)
Operational Status: ACTIVE / ASSET-LIGHT INTEGRATION & BIDDING NODE
